scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const bundlePath = 'dist/main.js'; if (!fs.existsSync(bundlePath)) throw new Error('Expected the minified production bundle at ' + bundlePath); const bundle = fs.readFileSync(bundlePath, 'utf8'); if (bundle.trim().length === 0) throw new Error('Expected the production bundle to contain JavaScript'); if (!bundle.includes('2026-07-15T10:00:00Z')) throw new Error('Expected the production bundle to contain the fixture entrypoint marker'); if (/\r?\n/.test(bundle)) throw new Error('Expected the production bundle to be minified to one line');"
